query:
SELECT l.projetoCustom as projeto, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(CAST(c.valorVenda AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
WHERE c.distrato = 0 AND l.projetoCustom IS NOT NULL AND l.projetoCustom != ''
GROUP BY l.projetoCustom
ORDER BY contratos DESC
LIMIT 10;
